name: Zalando SE
description: Zalando SE is a leading European online platform for fashion and lifestyle, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Founded in 2008, the company has grown into a major international retailer, serving over 51 million active customers across 25 European markets. Zalando offers a vast assortment of products, including clothing, shoes, and beauty items from more than 6,000 brands. By integrating retail, logistics, and technology, the company provides a comprehensive shopping experience, positioning itself as a central hub for fashion enthusiasts throughout Europe while continuously expanding its digital ecosystem and sustainability initiatives.
